creator: 33n5ps+89brie9u1qz9g@sharklasers.com
text:
I'm unable to run mosh (port: net/mosh).  The program requires Perl
IO::Pty module, which is missing.

How-To-Repeat: 
# portmaster net/mosh

% mosh
Can't locate IO/Pty.pm in @INC (@INC contains: /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.14.2/BSDPAN /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.14.2/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.14.2 /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.14.2/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.14.2 .) at /usr/local/bin/mosh line 38.
BEGIN failed--compilation aborted at /usr/local/bin/mosh line 38.
